articles.author: Jack Dunn
articles.title: Kelly Curtis, ‘The Sentinel’ Actress and Sister of Jamie Lee Curtis, Dies at 69 - Variety
articles.description: Kelly Curtis, an American actress and the sister of Jamie Lee Curtis, died on Saturday. She was 69.
articles.content:
Kelly Curtis, an American actress and the sister of Jamie Lee Curtis, died on Saturday. She was 69.

articles.author: Kate Sullivan, Michelle Jamrisko, Gerry Doyle
articles.title: Americans Hurt in Kuwait as Trump Sends Mixed Signals on War - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Several Americans were hurt in a missile attack on a Kuwaiti air base over the past day as a White House meeting to discuss extending the ceasefire with Iran ended without conclusion.
articles.content:
